initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_male_weekly
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS percentage
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'male';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS percentage
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id;

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' AND account.frequency = 'weekly' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'male' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_male_weekly
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id;
